svg.title: IoTextra Relay2 overview
svg.desc: IoTextra Relay2 — 2-channel SPDT relay module overview with key specs
svg.text: 2-channel SPDT relay module · 250 VAC / 30 VDC · 10 A · GPIO and/or I²C modes
Relay options: Panasonic ALQ105 · Omron G5Q-14 · HF33F/005-ZS3 · TE PE014005 · HOST and Qwiic connectors
Part of the IoTextra series · compatible with IoTsmart and IoTbase · Open Hardware
